title: Defaults
description: Global configuration and default values merged into all server and service definitions.

bitwarden.description: Bitwarden/Vaultwarden integration settings for storing generated credentials.

organization.description: Bitwarden organisation name to look up and file items under.

url_field_pattern.description: Regex matching server/service field names to store as Bitwarden URI entries rather than custom fields (e.g. fields containing IP addresses, FQDNs, or URLs).

collections.description: Bitwarden organisation collection names to file credentials into.

dns.description: Default values merged into all auto-generated DNS records. Individual records may override these.

priority.description: Default MX/SRV record priority. Null omits the field for non-priority record types.

proxied.description: Whether to proxy records through Cloudflare by default. Individual service records override this based on their networking.expose setting.

ttl.description: Default DNS TTL in seconds. Use 1 for Cloudflare's automatic TTL.

wildcard.description: Whether to create a wildcard CNAME (*.hostname → hostname) alongside each auto-generated A/AAAA/CNAME record by default.

domains.description: Domain names used to construct server and service FQDNs.

acme.description: Domain used for DNS-01 ACME challenge delegation. _acme-challenge CNAMEs on the external and internal domains point here, allowing a single token to issue certificates for all hostnames.

external.description: Public-facing domain. Server FQDNs are {name}.{region}.{external}; service FQDNs are {service}.{server_fqdn}.

internal.description: Internal Tailscale domain. Used for private service access via Tailscale IPs.

github.description: GitHub organisation and repository names used to push encrypted configuration files.

owner.description: GitHub organisation or user that owns the deployment repositories.

repositories.description: Names of the repositories that store deployment configurations for each platform.

fly.description: Repository for Fly.io app configs (fly.toml, .env, service templates). A GitHub Actions workflow deploys from here.

komodo.description: Repository for Komodo ResourceSync configs (stacks.toml, servers.toml, compose files). Komodo polls this repo.

truenas.description: Repository for TrueNAS app configs (compose.json, override.json, service config files). A GitHub Actions workflow applies these.

email.description: Primary contact email address. Used as the sender and recipient for alert emails (e.g. Gatus notifications via Resend).

managed_comment.description: Comment string attached to all Cloudflare DNS records to indicate they are managed by OpenTofu.

name.description: Organisation short name used in resource display names and identifiers.

resend.description: SMTP settings for the Resend email relay used by services that send alerts or notifications.

port.description: SMTP port (e.g. 465 for implicit TLS, 587 for STARTTLS).

username.description: SMTP username. Resend uses 'resend' as the fixed username; the API key is the password.

servers.description: Default field values deep-merged into every server definition before processing. Keys mirror the server schema.

services.description: Default field values deep-merged into every service definition before processing. Keys mirror the service schema.

system.description: Default OS-level settings injected into cloud-init for provisioned servers.

timezone.description: System timezone in tz database format (e.g. 'Australia/Sydney').

tailscale.description: Tailscale network configuration applied when provisioning Tailscale keys.

admin_identities.description: Tailscale identity emails or passkey names granted admin access to the tailnet.

tags.description: ACL tag names available to assign to devices and auth keys (e.g. 'server', 'vm', 'cicd').
